entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An important pulse crop (Cicer arietinum L.) used as food, known for high protein and carbohydrate content

entities.name: BEAN
entities.description: A pulse crop used as a production benchmark for chickpea

entities.name: PEA
entities.description: A pulse crop used as a production benchmark for chickpea

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The protein level in chickpea, ranging from 12% to 31%

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATE CONTENT
entities.description: The carbohydrate level in chickpea, ranging from 52% to 71%

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approaches used to improve chickpea yields

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Modern breeding approaches using molecular tools to improve chickpea yields

entities.name: SYNTHETIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical fertilizers used to increase crop productivity

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control pests and diseases

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Adverse effects on crops caused by living organisms, such as fungal diseases

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by fungi that reduce the productivity of chickpea

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A specific fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: DRY ROOT ROT
entities.description: A specific fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A specific fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: COLLAR ROT
entities.description: A specific fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: BOTRYTIS GRAY MOLD
entities.description: A specific fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: ADVANCED SOWING DATE
entities.description: A cultural control measure used to manage fungal diseases

entities.name: SOLARIZATION OF SOIL
entities.description: A soil treatment method used to control fungal diseases

entities.name: PATHOGEN-FREE SEED
entities.description: The use of seeds devoid of pathogens to prevent disease

entities.name: FUNGICIDE-TREATED SEED
entities.description: The use of seeds treated with fungicides to prevent disease

entities.name: RESISTANT CULTIVAR
entities.description: The use of crop varieties that possess genetic resistance to pathogens

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant cultivar to resist infection by pathogens

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL OPTIONS
entities.description: The use of biological agents to manage plant pathogens

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH PROMOTING ACTINOBACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that promote plant growth and are used to manage fungal diseases

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Chemical compounds produced by actinobacteria used for disease management
